positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized depiction of celestial botanical life. Focus on exotic flora (moon flowers, glowing vines, star ferns) interwoven with cosmic elements (nebulae dust, stylized constellations). The style should emulate intricate linocut woodblock printing, utilizing strong, clean silhouettes and deep contrast between luminous white and midnight blue/deep emerald green. The composition must be central, maximizing negative space for print readability. The artwork should have clear, defined edges, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, graphic novel quality, minimal shading, vibrant jewel tones.
negative: low detail, grainy, artifacts, watermark, signature, logo, text, writing, blur, noise, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, amateur, poorly drawn, grayscale, photographic, messy
